properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: May our homes be filled with dancing, may our streets be filled with joy. may injustice bow to Jesus as the people turn to pray.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: From the mountains to the valleys hear our praises rise to You, From the heavens to the nations hear our singing fill the air.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: May Your light shine in the darkness as we walk before the cross may Your glory fill the whole earth as the water o'er seas.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah hallelujah, hallelujah… hallelujah, hallelujah hallelujah, hallelujah… [x3]
